[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000100 3
1 0000010100 2
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 1100101100 5
6 0001111011 6
7 0100011110 5

01 10 0000101000 2
12 21 0000011010 3
23 32 0100001000 2
34 43 1110101000 5
45 54 0110111000 5
56 65 0011000100 3 match 0
67 76 0000000100 1
70 07 0000000100 1

02 20 0100001100 3
13 31 0000101000 2
24 42 0100011000 3
35 53 0110101000 4
46 64 0010000000 1
57 75 0000010100 2 match 1
60 06 0000000100 1
71 17 0000010000 1

03 30 1100101000 4
14 41 0000111000 3
25 52 0100011100 4
36 63 0010000000 1
47 74 0000010000 1
50 05 0100101100 4
61 16 0001000000 1
72 27 0000010100 2 match 1

26 62 0000000100 1
37 73 0000000000 a match 2 3 4
